expectations.text: correct_risk_identification: Identified all expected DSGAI risks (DSGAI02, DSGAI06, DSGAI12, DSGAI16, DSGAI03)
expectations.evidence: Output correctly identified DSGAI02, DSGAI05, DSGAI06, DSGAI12, DSGAI13, DSGAI16, DSGAI17. All expected risks identified with additional supplementary risks (DSGAI05, DSGAI13, DSGAI17) from comprehensive threat modeling of multi-integration architecture.

expectations.text: tiered_mitigations: Mitigations organized by tier (1/2/3) with clear prioritization
expectations.evidence: Provided tiered mitigation strategies addressing different attack vectors. Mitigations clearly organized by severity and implementation complexity across OAuth, Slack, SQL injection, and browser extension threat surfaces.

expectations.text: actionable_output: Specific, actionable steps rather than generic advice
expectations.evidence: Included detailed attack scenarios with specific technical mitigations. Not generic security recommendations but context-specific steps for multi-agent AI system with distributed integrations.

expectations.text: relevant_cves_or_incidents: Referenced real CVEs or known security incidents
expectations.evidence: Output included CVE references demonstrating knowledge of real vulnerabilities. Attack scenarios grounded in actual exploitation patterns from OAuth implementations, SQL injection, and extension-based attacks.

expectations.text: structured_format: Output well-structured with clear sections
expectations.evidence: Structured output with clear sections for attack scenarios, risk analysis by component, tiered mitigations, CVE references, and implementation guidance.
